sources.page_title: Gyeon Q² CanCoat EVO | Spray-On Ceramic Coating & Paint Protection — Polished Bliss
sources.cleaned_content:
Gyeon Q² CanCoat EVO

Brand: Gyeon

Price: £42.00

Availability: 19 in stock, ready to be shipped

We Say:
Gyeon Q² CanCoat EVO is a very easy to use quartz coating aimed squarely at detailing enthusiasts looking to upgrade to silica-based paint protection for the first time. Indeed, the fundamental aim underpinning the development of Gyeon Q² CanCoat EVO was to formulate a more accessible and user-friendly quartz coating, i.e. one that would be reasonably priced and extremely easy to apply. Gyeon have achieved this by downgrading and simplifying the formula used to make Gyeon Q² Pure and packaging it in a simple spray bottle. In doing so, they have retained most of the performance benefits associated with silica-based coatings (i.e. impressive looks, excellent durability and strong self-cleaning properties) and eliminated most of the factors that have the potential to trip up novice users (i.e. fiddly applicator systems, short drying times and long curing times).

The most notable benefits offered by Gyeon Q² CanCoat EVO are as follows:

Firstly, like the other SiO2-based coatings in the Gyeon range, it delivers unbelievable looks characterised by a strong colour jetting effect and excellent reflectivity and gloss.

Secondly, because it is silica-based it forms a coating that is significantly harder and more durable than traditional sealants and waxes. So much so in fact, that it can withstand being cleaned with high-strength detergents and spirit-based tar removers without being significantly degraded.

Thirdly, due to the extremely hydrophobic nature of the coating it lays down, Gyeon Q² CanCoat EVO imparts a strong self-cleaning effect that actively repels fresh dirt and grime, meaning treated surfaces stay cleaner for longer.

Lastly, thanks to its innovative packaging, it's by far the easiest to use SiO2-based coating currently on the market, and no harder to use than a regular spray sealant.

Key Features:
Beading: 9/10 (Compared To Others)
Durability: 12 Months + (Average Value)
Slickness: 8/10 (Compared To Others)

Description:
Gyeon Q² CanCoat EVO is an advanced quartz coating that simultaneously protects and enhances the appearance of automotive paint. Developed in South Korea, Gyeon Q² CanCoat EVO uses the latest in low volatile content silicon (Si) technology to lay down a film of siloxane polymers that condense rapidly to form an SiO2 coating that bonds to painted surfaces at the molecular level. As a result of being coated with an ultra-smooth layer of SiO2, treated surfaces become extremely hydrophobic, which causes rainfall and rinse water to bead up and roll off very quickly. This extreme beading not only looks good, but also tends to pick up and carry away fresh contaminants, which makes routine washing easier and safer. In addition to these benefits, Gyeon Q² CanCoat EVO also provides excellent protection against bird droppings, bug splatter, road salt and harmful UV radiation for upwards of six months per application, even on daily drivers.

To make the application process simple and straightforward, Gyeon Q² CanCoat EVO is supplied in an aluminium spray bottle. This enables it to be sprayed-on and wiped-off, which eliminates the need to use an applicator pad and makes it just as easy to use as a spray sealant or quick detailer. Furthermore, unlike some SiO2-based products, Gyeon Q² CanCoat EVO contains relatively little alcohol and thus doesn't flash off rapidly, which again makes it easier to use. These characteristics, coupled with the fact that it is virtually impervious to cleaning chemicals and pressure washing, make Gyeon Q² CanCoat EVO an ideal choice of last step product for enthusiasts running daily drivers and seeking a superior level of paint protection that is easy to apply.

Gyeon Q² CanCoat EVO is currently supplied as a pre-packed kit containing a 200 ml bottle of Gyeon Q² CanCoat, three spray heads, a microfibre buffing towel and an instruction booklet.

Specification:
- Adds Protection: Yes
- Application Method: By hand only
- Beading: 9
- Dangerous Goods: Y
- Durability: 12 months +
- Emits Strong Fumes: Yes
- Enhances Gloss: Yes
- Flake Pop: 10
- Glossiness: 9
- Hardness: 6
- Layerable: Yes (allow 1 hour between coats)
- Recommended For: All paint types and colours
- Reflectivity: 10
- Richness: 8
- Scratch Resistant: No
- Size: 200 ml Kit
- Slickness: 8
- Trim-Safe: Yes

How To Use:
You should apply Gyeon Q² CanCoat EVO in a dry place out of direct sunlight. In all cases, prepare the surfaces you are going to treat in the normal way (wash > decontaminate > polish), and then do a wipe down with Gyeon Q²M Prep to ensure that they are spotlessly clean. For best results, spray Gyeon Q² CanCoat on to either the supplied microfibre towel or a PB Super Buffing Towel and immediately wipe it over a single panel to spread a thin, even film of product. Then refold the towel and continue buffing to fully remove the film and reveal an intense streak-free shine. Alternatively, mist a Meguiar's Even Coat Microfiber Applicator Pad with Gyeon Q² CanCoat EVO and wipe a thin, even film of product over a single panel at a time before buffing off with either the supplied microfibre towel or a PB Super Buffing Towel. Either way, you should aim to complete all of the buffing off within 1-2 minutes, i.e. before the coating begins to harden.

After all panels are treated, wait for a minimum of an hour and then apply a second coat (we recommend applying 2-3 coats back to back, as the resulting finish will be awesome in terms of looks and durability). The car must then be left in a warm, dry place out of direct sunlight for a minimum of 4 hours to allow the SiO2 coating to harden (if you wish, you can accelerate this process by heating the treated panels to 60°C for 10 minutes using an infra-red heat lamp). Finally, to reduce the risk of water spots forming while the coating continues to cure (full curing takes around 24 hours to achieve), you should apply a protective topcoat of Gyeon Q²M Cure (you should also avoid washing the car with any kind of detergent for the first 7 days).

Note that you must flush the spray head with hot water after each use; failure to do so will result in any product residue left in the spray head hardening and blocking it.

Quantity Discounts:

Available Size: 200 ml - $62.99

Customer Reviews: 100% of customers said that they would buy this item again (Based upon 7 ratings)

Product Description:
Gyeon CanCoat Evo takes everything we loved about the original CanCoat and enhances it! CanCoat Evo is essentially a coating in a can, designed to help you save time when protecting your paint! We all love coatings, the glossy look and durable protection they provide, but they can be time consuming to apply. CanCoat is a coating, packed into an aerosol can that you spray onto the paint, and wipe away with a clean microfiber towel. Application is really that easy and allows you to coat an entire car in around 20 minutes! The protective layer left behind helps protect the paint from UV rays, strong chemicals, bird droppings, road salt and other road grime. Its 200ml size allows you to coat or re-apply it 10 to 15 times and one coat will last up to 12 months according to the manufacturer.

Gyeon coatings have been completely redesigned and this technology has never used before in car coatings. Evo products utilize a world-first use of the fluoro-modified polisylazane technology that pushes the Evo line to the forefront of car coatings. This technology means extended durability, extreme chemical resistance, longer lasting performance, and only one layer is needed. It remains easy to apply and much easier wipe off than before.

If you are pressed for time, but do not want to sacrifice protection, grab yourself a can of the Gyeon CanCoat Evo today!

Note: All Evo formulas can be applied outdoors. Avoid direct sun and ideally do not get wet in the first 12 hours after application.

From The Label:
Ultimate Spray & Wipe Ceramic Coating
The easiest ceramic coating - reinvented. Hydrophobic, resistant and durable. Even easier to apply! Outdoor use allowed. Possible use on all external surfaces.
After use, always clean the sprayer and close with a cap!

Professional Detailer Review:
Gyeon CanCoat is one of the most versatile coatings on the market. With a single product able to coat paint, trim, lights, metal, wheels, even windows.

Customer Reviews:

Review by Bruce W. (9/18/2023) - DI Verified Purchase - Would buy again: Yes
CanCoat is an easy to use product that provides some excellent hydrophobic qualities to the paint. I can't speak to its longevity yet, but it was extremely easy to apply without any issues. You spray two pumps on the included microfiber applicator/towel and wipe on the paint surface. I used very little for an entire car and had zero high spots. This is a great quick to use, easy to apply product that seems to offer some nice protection and added gloss. Will definitely continue to use where full ceramic coating is not desired/unavailable.

Review by Fabio I. (2/18/2023) - DI Verified Purchase - Would buy again: Yes
I have used this before on my car collection as a maintenance and for windows, super easy to apply.

Review by Vincent C. (10/19/2022) - DI Verified Purchase - Would buy again: Yes
This may be my favorite detailing product right now. I really like the idea of a 1 year or so ceramic coat, i feel no matter what you do on a daily driver its going to need a yearly light polishing(which likely removes the coating). The application is so easy the only way to express it would to say you basically need to feel like your doing it wrong. You shouldnt feel like your using a ceramic coat, its more like a quick detailer. Several sprays per panel and work quick and trust the process, itll work. You shouldnt see the typical ceramic residue, itll flash so fast you wont see it after a few wipes. The hydrophobics are INSANE, gloss levels, chemical protection are off the charts and ease of use its absurd(when done right). The price point is also major bargain. Basically $10 dollars or so per vehicle, this 1 bottle should be more like $150+.

EASY & EFFICIENT:
Q² CanCoat EVO is the easiest coating to apply you will experience. It is also the best value for money product to protect or maintain your ceramic coated car. Its 200ml allows you to coat or re-apply it over 10 to 15 times!

DURABLE HYDROPHOBIC PROPERTIES:
Q² CanCoat EVO offers more durable performance, improved visual enhancement and hydrophobic properties - all thanks to the updated EVO formula. It remains as easy to apply as it used to, now featuring even easier wipe off.

NO GARAGE? NO PROBLEM! Apply outdoors.
All EVO formulas can be applied outdoors. Ensure stable conditions, never use in direct sunlight and check the weather forecast! The coating should not get wet in the first 12 hours after application.

BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN:
Q² CanCoat EVO is the most versatile ceramic coating. It might be applied on paint, trim, rims, metal, carbon fibre or PPF/vinyl. It is both a stand-alone product as well as a topcoat. TIP: Never spray in the direction of the vehicle and mind working in an area with low air movement to avoid overspray. Work in small sections to avoid streaks.

All GYEON products does not contain any Per- and Polyfluoroalkyl Substances (PFAS / 'forever chemicals') as defined or restricted under the relevant Canadian environmental and chemical management regulations.

The easiest to use coating:
CanCoat EVO stands out as one of the easiest and most versatile SiO2-based coatings in the detailing market. It provides the best value for money, delivering excellent protection and maintenance for your ceramic-coated or non-coated car. This durable spray-on ceramic coating enhances your vehicle's protection, beading, gloss, and slickness, all in one convenient spray bottle.

Easy To Apply & Efficient:
CanCoat EVO is the easiest coating to apply, providing a user-friendly experience. It also offers the best value for money to protect or maintain your ceramic-coated car. With its 200ml capacity, you can coat or reapply it over 10 to 15 times!

Durable & Hydrophobic:
CanCoat EVO offers more durable performance, improved visual enhancement, and enhanced hydrophobic properties—all thanks to the updated EVO formula. It remains as easy to apply as it used to, now featuring an even easier wipe-off process.

One Bottle = Multiple Vehicles:
CanCoat EVO has a consumption rate of 10-15ml per car. A 200ml bottle can cover approximately 13 vehicles, providing great value with exceptional results.

FAQs:

How long does it last?
This depends on several factors. For our Canadian climate, we often recommend applying two layers. While this won't double the coating's longevity, it can still provide a significant boost, around 20% or more, compared to a single-layer application. It is recommended to top up with Gyeon Cure or Gyeon Ceramic Detailer to get the maximum durability out of the coating.
The timeframe below is under regular maintenance with Gyeon Cure or Gyeon Ceramic Detailer:
- Summer-driven only (garage kept): at least 12 months or beyond
- Summer-driven with no garage: ~12 months
- Winter-driven only (garage kept): 6-12 months
- Daily-driven: 6-12 months
In the winter, maintenance becomes crucial for its longevity for daily/winter-driven cars. Without regular maintenance or reapplication during the winter months, you may notice wear and deterioration on the lower sections due to road salts, chemicals, contaminants, and other factors.

What's the layering time?
We typically recommend waiting around 2 hours between layers for CanCoat EVO, but it's best not to exceed 12 hours. If you wait too long, you'll be applying the second layer onto a surface that has already hardened and become slick, diminishing the effectiveness of bonding. Ideally, you want to apply the second layer when the first layer is still in the process of curing, allowing for cohesive bonding.

How much will the bottle do?
With the new EVOs, a 200ml bottle can cover an average of 13 mid-sized vehicles with one layer! It's important to note that applying two coats does make a noticeable difference.

What can I layer it with?
You can layer CanCoat EVO with another layer of CanCoat EVO, Gyeon Cure, or Ceramic Detailer. The general rule of thumb is to apply the most durable product first and the slicker product on top. CanCoat EVO can also be used as a topper for ceramic-coated cars.

After coating, when can I take the vehicle out?
A general rule of thumb is to avoid water contact for 24 to 48 hours and refrain from using soap for a week. However, after the coating is applied, you can take the vehicle out immediately. Dust, dew, and wind won't have much effect, but it's important to be mindful of bugs, which can impact the finish.

How cold (or hot) can I apply the coating under?
A temperature of at least 10°C is recommended, although you can still attempt the application between 5°C to 10°C if necessary. If the temperature reaches 30°C, then it's on the warmer side, and you will need to retreat into the shade. Ideally, you want the coating to remain on the panel for at least 30 to 60 seconds without flashing right away.

Can I apply the coating outdoors?
Absolutely, all the new Gyeon EVO coatings can be applied outdoors; just be mindful of the temperature.

What do I maintain it with and how often?
You can use products like Gyeon WetCoat, Cure, Ceramic Detailer, etc., as frequently as you'd like. The only thing to caution about is using waxes on your coating (Gyeon Wax is fine) because most waxes have strong solvents that may affect the coating.

I have a 'high-spot', what do I do?
High spots refer to dried coatings that were not completely buffed off. If you catch the high spots within 30 minutes, you can use the coating itself again to level/soften the high spots. If it's been a few days, then you'll need to mechanically polish it off or use Gyeon Total Remover to remove and reapply coating on the affected area.

What can I wash it with afterwards?
Any pH-neutral soap is suitable for use, and Gyeon recommends Bathe and Bathe+. Ideally, avoid using wash and 'wax' products. While you can use them, it's worth noting that a wash and 'wax' product tends to diminish the water-beading properties of your coating.

What's the expiration date? New and opened.
Officially, Gyeon recommends the product to be used within 2 to 3 years when new. If the bottle has been opened, it's best to use up the product within 6 months to preserve the coating's maximum effectiveness.

Can I apply it on PPF, Trim, Plastics, Wheels, Chrome and Windows?
Yes, CanCoat EVO is extremely versatile. It can be applied on paint, trim, rims, metal, carbon fiber, or PPF/vinyl. For glass, avoid the front windshield, as certain wiper/washer fluid combos may chatter. Use Gyeon View or QuickView for a chatter-free experience.

Can it be shipped in the cold?
No problem at all. Coatings contain a significant amount of solvents and exhibit high chemical stability.

Does it harden/crystalize?
Yes, it does crystallize. It is a true SiO2 ceramic coating in a spray form. Because it crystallizes, we recommend doing a final inspection on each panel/section after application to avoid any "high spots." To avoid clogged-up triggers, we recommend that after each application, you take the sprayer out and rinse it thoroughly with hot water. Make sure to put the metal cap back on and seal it tightly to avoid any crystallization inside the bottle.

sources.page_title: Gyeon Q² CanCoat EVO | Spray-On Ceramic Coating Protection – Esoteric Car Care
sources.cleaned_content:
Gyeon Q2 CanCoat Evo

Price: $62.99

In stock, ready to ship

The Easiest Spray-On Ceramic Coating for Real-World Protection

Gyeon Q² CanCoat EVO is a spray-on SiO₂ ceramic coating designed to deliver meaningful protection, gloss enhancement, and hydrophobic performance with an application process that takes minutes—not hours.

Re-engineered with Gyeon's EVO technology, CanCoat EVO improves durability, slickness, and wipe-off behavior while maintaining the simplicity that made the original CanCoat a favorite among enthusiasts and professionals alike.

Why CanCoat EVO Is Different:
Unlike traditional ceramic coatings that require controlled environments and complex leveling, Q² CanCoat EVO is applied by simply spraying onto a microfiber towel and wiping evenly across the surface until full gloss is achieved.

This makes it an ideal solution for:
- First-time ceramic coating users
- Fast protection for daily driven vehicles
- Maintenance and rejuvenation of existing ceramic coatings
- Seasonal protection when time or conditions are limited

Performance Characteristics:
- Spray-on SiO₂ ceramic coating with EVO chemistry
- Strong gloss enhancement with a clean, reflective finish
- Excellent hydrophobic and self-cleaning behavior
- Extremely fast and forgiving application
- Safe for use on paint, wheels, trim, and exterior surfaces

Durability & Coverage:
- Typical durability: up to 6 months depending on maintenance
- 200 ml bottle provides approximately 10–15 full vehicle applications

Best Practices for Ceramic Coatings:
- Use coatings as soon as practical after receiving them
- Due to the crystallizing nature of ceramic chemistry, use within 4–6 months for optimal performance

Esoteric & Gyeon: Proven Experience:
Esoteric was the original importer and exclusive U.S. distributor of Gyeon products beginning in 2015, well before ceramic coatings became widely adopted in the North American market.

Application Overview:
Spray onto a microfiber towel and wipe evenly across the surface until full gloss is achieved. Extremely forgiving and beginner-friendly ceramic coating application.

Durability & Use Case:
Up to 6 months of protection. Ideal as a standalone ceramic coating or as maintenance for existing ceramic-coated vehicles.

Professional Insight:
Developed for fast, real-world protection when time, environment, or experience level limits traditional ceramic coating application.

Gyeon Q2 CanCoat EVO 200 ml

Price: Rs. 2,999.00

2 reviews

Q2 CanCoat EVO - THE EASIEST TO USE AND MOST VERSATILE CERAMIC COATING IN SPRAY FORM

Experience the pinnacle of car care with the Q² CanCoat EVO, the revolutionary ceramic coating spray that delivers professional-grade protection with unparalleled ease. Say goodbye to complicated application processes and hello to a flawless, hydrophobic finish in minutes!

Why Choose Q² CanCoat EVO?

- Unbelievably Easy Application: Forget lengthy procedures. Simply spray onto the included microfiber and wipe until a brilliant gloss emerges. It's that simple! Perfect for DIY enthusiasts and professionals alike.

- Enhanced Durability with EVO Formula: The updated EVO formula elevates performance, providing a robust SiO2-based coating that lasts up to 12 months or 12,000 kilometers. Enjoy long-lasting protection against the elements.

- Superior Hydrophobic Properties: Watch water bead and roll off your vehicle effortlessly, thanks to the CanCoat EVO's exceptional hydrophobic effect. This self-cleaning action keeps your car looking cleaner for longer.

- Versatile Protection for All Surfaces: Protect more than just your paint! Q² CanCoat EVO is safe and effective on paint, trim, rims, metal, carbon fiber, and PPF/vinyl. Use it as a standalone coating or a topcoat for existing ceramic protection.

- Outdoor Application Made Simple: No garage? No problem! Our EVO formula is designed for outdoor use. Just avoid direct sunlight and wet conditions for 12 hours post-application.

- Exceptional Value: Each 200ml bottle provides 10-15 applications, making Q² CanCoat EVO an incredibly cost-effective solution for maintaining your vehicle's pristine condition.

- Professional Results, Simplified: Achieve a showroom-worthy shine with minimal effort. This product is designed to bring professional level ceramic coating to the everyday user.

Key Features:
- SiO2-Based Formula: Provides durable, long-lasting protection.
- Spray-On Application: For quick and easy use.
- Hydrophobic Effect: Repels water and dirt.
- UV Protection: Shields your car's paint from sun damage.
- pH Tolerance: 2-11, ensuring resistance to various environmental contaminants.
- Consumption: 10-15ml per car.

What's Included:
- Q² CanCoat EVO (200ml)
- 3 Spray Heads
- Microfiber Cloth
- Door Stickers

Customer Reviews (Based on 2 reviews):

Thangmen Tangha - Great Product: The product is great and to get it at this rate is phenomenal. Just buy it if u are looking for a light weight ceramic.

Rakesh - Effortless Protection with Serious Performance: Spray it, wipe it, and boom—ceramic-level shine and protection in minutes. CanCoat is perfect for fast results that last. I used it as a top coat for gyeon pure to get through monsoon and boost that slickness, extra bit of protection after a full chemical decon. One can never go wrong with cancoat!
